# konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain (Resource)

EventGatewayVirtualClusterProducePolicyChain Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain" "my_eventgatewayvirtualclusterproducepolicychain" {
  gateway_id = "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458"
  policies = [
    {
      id = "bbecedad-d0d2-4813-b9a9-943c7602daa7"
    }
  ]
  virtual_cluster_id = "7e770a6a-a821-46f3-9e54-b38e9ca5ab60"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gateway_id` (String) The UUID of your Gateway.
- `policies` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))
- `virtual_cluster_id` (String) The ID of the Virtual Cluster.

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Optional:

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the policy. Not Null

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain.my_konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain
  id = jsonencode({
    gateway_id = "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458"
    virtual_cluster_id = "..."
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain.my_konnect_event_gateway_virtual_cluster_produce_policy_chain '{"gateway_id": "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458", "virtual_cluster_id": "..."}'
```
